calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-28-2021 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-29-2021 Continued To Jul-28-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nicole Rosser appeared by telephone for Killian Noyes.

The Court noted that verification to the supplement is needed and that the required language under Probate Code 9202(b) was not provided and is also needed. Ms. Rosser stated that she has been unable to get her Client on line, that he is military and that it complicates things. The First and Final Report of Administrator on Waivers of Accounting, etc. is continued to July 28, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Johnson. Not reported.

Off Calendar Nov-18-2019 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-07-2019 Continued To Nov-18-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Nicole Rosser for Petitioner via Court Call.

The Court noted there were no responses to the examiner's notes. Ms. Rosser stated she didn't get them until late last week and didn't know there was time to respond.

The petition for Letters of Administration is continued to November 18, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Rosser to respond to examiner's notes.

Judge: Charlene P. Kiesselbach. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
